name: Fix Stage 1-1 boss arena entry and boss health bar persistence
theme: Fix boss arena layout so player enters from below (not above) and fix boss health bar hiding when player leaves arena
features: F2: Boss health bar hide on exit

criteria.description: The left wall of the boss arena (col 65) must extend from row 0 down to at least row 13 as solid tiles, preventing the player from wall-jumping above the arena ceiling
testSteps: Verify col 65 is filled SOLID from row 0 to row 13 (no empty tiles above the ceiling that would let a player climb over)
Verify the arena ceiling at row 5 (cols 65-84) remains intact
criteria.threshold: Col 65 rows 0-13 are all TILE_SOLID, no gap above ceiling

criteria.description: The boss arena has an open entry gap in the left wall at ground level (approximately rows 14-16) that funnels the player DOWN into the arena floor where the Elder Shroomba is
testSteps: Verify there is an opening in col 65 at approximately rows 14-16 (or similar ground-level rows) that allows the player to walk into the arena at floor level
Verify the entry is below the arena ceiling (row 5) so the player enters the playable space, not above it
criteria.threshold: Entry gap exists at ground level in col 65, funneling player into arena floor

criteria.description: The boss trigger wall-sealing code in states.js still seals the entry gap when the boss fight begins (fills empty tiles in col 65)
testSteps: Verify the wall-sealing loop fills empty tiles in col 65 from row 0 to Level.height - 3
Confirm that the entry gap (rows 14-16) will be filled with TILE_SOLID when the boss triggers
criteria.threshold: Trigger code seals the entry gap, preventing player from leaving during boss fight

criteria.description: The boss health bar (including the 'Elder Shroomba' label) hides when the player is outside the boss arena area
testSteps: Verify that the boss health bar rendering includes a position check — the bar should only render when the player is within the boss arena X bounds (Player.x >= Level.bossArenaX or equivalent)
Verify that leaving the boss area causes the health bar to disappear
criteria.threshold: Boss health bar is not rendered when player is outside boss arena bounds

criteria.description: The game still loads and runs without errors after changes
testSteps: Verify the canvas element exists and renders
Verify no JavaScript errors in the console
criteria.threshold: Game loads and renders without JS errors

criteria.description: The boss arena right wall and ceiling remain intact (unchanged)
testSteps: Verify right wall col 84 is still SOLID rows 5-16
Verify ceiling row 5 cols 65-84 is still SOLID
Verify floor rows 17-19 cols 65-84 is still SOLID
criteria.threshold: Right wall, ceiling, and floor are unchanged
